<!-- indicator: tbl-15to19-suicide-mortal-crude -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-15to19-suicide-mortal-crude
#| tbl-cap: 'Suicide Mortality, Crude Rate per 100,000 Total Population Compared to Those 15–19 Years Old, 2020–2022'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-15to19-suicide-mortal-crude", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-15to19-suicide-mortal-crude", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
